name: Social Champ
description:
As a free tool, Social Champ is great for small teams or solo SMMs with a limited budget. With it, you can effectively manage day-to-day posting, optimize content, and test out new strategies. With white labeling available, it’s great for freelancers, too.

  • Social Champ is free, but is $29/month for multiple users
  • White labeling makes Social Champ great for freelancers or small agencies
  • The bulk upload feature streamlines content management
  • Client approval is simplified with an intuitive approval workflow
  • Post to Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram

Key features:

✅ White labeling

✅ Approval workflow

✅ Content optimization
what_people_say:
What people say :

Social Champ is perfect for freelancers and small agencies alike. With great approval workflows and white labeling capabilities, it’s easy to manage everything in one place. Here’s what people say:

“For a small advertising agency, digital magazines, social media managers who manage many accounts & need a service that allows rapid management of social networks, Social Champ is an excellent choice. Direct and quick to understand, & works great on the web.”

"Social Champ is perfect for small to mid-sized teams. The content optimization and easy client approval make a significant difference."
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Robust reporting
  • 🚫 Intuitive user interface
  • 🚫 Free plan has limited functionality
